metadata.description: Multi-lineage blind research panel for Claude Code — 3+ model lineages answer a consequential question independently, the seat seals its own answer first, and consolidation leads with where they disagree.

plugins.name: decorrelated-research
plugins.description: For questions with no cheap oracle: dispatch a blind prompt (stripped of your own hypotheses) to 3+ seats spanning 2+ model lineages, require 2+ returns, consolidate divergence-first with the house labels (CORROBORATED / MAJORITY / DIVERGENT / SINGLE / OWNER-FORK), audit citations, and compare against your own pre-sealed answer. Gathers material to ground a decision; never signs it.
